rules.name: >5c feed-in, if forecast is sunny for 2 days. 30%
dont discharge if cloudy for 3 days
Charge Battery if Semi-Empty & Chance of Spike Coming
Charge if Buy Price is Negative
Good Feed In - Semi Full Battery
Charge Battery if Semi-Empty & Chance of Spike Upcoming
Charge if Buy Price is negative
Good Feed In - Semi Full Battery
Force charge during free window on weekends
Force charge during off-peak when battery is low
Force Charge - semi-empty and chance of spike incoming
Battery boost if needed during 1pm to 3pm
Charge Battery if Semi-Empty & Change of Spike Upcoming
Feed In - Good Semi Full Battery
Baseline - Charge battery/Use first, then export surpluss
Okay feed in, Battery more than 60 % full - sunny next day - SELL
Charge when cheap enough but quite low
Charge when cheaper and less than 80% in afternoon
Charge when spike predicted and battery low
Cloudy days are coming, battery less than 60%- HOLD
High Feed In - Battery more than 50% - sell if sunny next day
Good Feed In - Battery more than 60% - sell
Higher Feed In Price, battery more than half full - sell
High Feed In Price, less than half full BUT cloudy next day - HOLD
High Feed In Price, less than half full BUT sunny next day - sell to 30
Okay feed in, Battery more than 40 % full early hours of morning- SELL
Very high Feed in - SELL down to 30%
Very Very high feed in price
